decisions.reasoning: Fundamentals intact: Q3 FY2026 beat (Azure +40% CC, AI ARR $37B +123% YoY). The June selloff from $460 to $357 is driven by (1) $190B capex guidance compressing FCF toward zero in 2026, (2) sector rotation from software into semis (MU +324% YTD vs MSFT -23% YTD), (3) hawkish FOMC June 17 multiple compression. No fundamental deterioration; 35/36 analysts Buy with avg target $562-565 (~50% implied upside). Holding for Q4 FY2026 earnings catalyst in late July (guided Azure 39-40% CC, revenue $86.7-$87.8B).

sources.headline: MSFT enters bear market, worst-performing Mag-7 stock in 2026 (-23% YTD)
Microsoft: Wall Street sees 50% upside after 2026 drop; 35/36 analysts Buy, avg target $562-565
Microsoft Q3 FY2026 beat: $82.9B revenue, Azure +39-40% CC, AI ARR $37B +123% YoY
Microsoft $190B capex is both the bull and bear case; FCF compression is the market primary concern

decisions.invalidation: MSFT Q4 FY2026 earnings miss Azure guidance (<37% CC growth) in late July, or second Fed rate hike before earnings further compresses multiple

decisions.reasoning: Q1 FY2027 exceptional ($81.6B revenue +85% YoY, Data Center $75.2B +92% YoY). Micron blowout Q3 (June 24: $41.5B revenue, 84.9% GM, $100B binding customer agreements, Q4 guided $50B) directly validates AI demand; Micron entire HBM4 production sold out under contracts primarily with Nvidia for Vera Rubin. China $4.5B charge already absorbed in Q1 FY2027. However, NVDA is down ~3% from open today despite Micron beat - stock not rallying on its own catalyst is a near-term bearish signal, so no add. Holding for Vera Rubin H2 2026 launch and Q2 FY2027 earnings Aug 26 2026. Analyst consensus $268-299 vs $194 current (~40-54% upside).

sources.headline: Micron Q3 FY2026: record $41.5B revenue, 84.9% gross margins, $100B customer agreements; Q4 guided $50B
Nvidia Q1 FY2027: $81.6B revenue +85% YoY, Data Center $75.2B, Blackwell sold out through mid-2026
Nvidia concedes China AI chip market to Huawei; H20 ban caused $4.5B charge already booked in Q1 FY2027
Nvidia NVDA stock struggles as semiconductor sector faces pressure despite Micron beat

decisions.invalidation: Q2 FY2027 earnings (Aug 26) show Blackwell demand softening, or hyperscaler capex commentary decelerates; custom silicon (Amazon Trainium, Google TPU, Broadcom Jalapeño) takes share faster than expected

decisions.reasoning: Only position with a long SMA signal (10-day SMA $724 above 30-day SMA $722). Broad Nasdaq-100 provides diversified tech upside. Holding as core broad-market tech position. AI earnings season starting July is the catalyst; hawkish macro is the risk.

sources.headline: Nasdaq +0.24% as Micron rally offsets hot PCE print; AI earnings season approaching
FOMC holds 3.50-3.75%, 9 of 18 members project at least one hike; hawkish shift weighs on growth multiples

decisions.invalidation: Fed hikes rates in July/August, or Q2 earnings season shows broad tech EPS misses vs elevated +42% YoY expectations priced in

decisions.reasoning: Nearly flat from entry (-0.3%). SPY SMA signal flat (10-day $741 below 30-day $744). Broad market anchor; Iran ceasefire mildly positive for tail-risk reduction. No catalyst to add or trim.

sources.headline: S&P 500 +0.52% as Micron rally and Iran ceasefire reduce macro tail risks despite hot PCE 4.1%
PCE inflation 4.1% annual rate, highest since April 2023; Fed rate hike probability elevated

decisions.invalidation: PCE or CPI accelerates further prompting Fed emergency hike, or Iran ceasefire breaks down and oil spikes back above $100/bbl

summary: First session: held all four existing positions (MSFT, NVDA, QQQ, SPY), no trades; MSFT selloff driven by $190B capex/FCF compression and software-to-semis sector rotation; NVDA AI demand thesis confirmed by Micron blowout but stock underperforming today; hawkish FOMC (June 17) and 4.1% PCE are primary macro headwinds; key catalysts are MSFT Q4 earnings late July and NVDA Q2 FY2027 earnings Aug 26
open_theses: MSFT: $190B capex is near-term FCF headwind but Azure AI ($37B ARR +123%) and 35/36 analyst Buy consensus with $562 avg target suggest deep value at $357; catalyst is Q4 FY2026 earnings late July

NVDA: Micron HBM4 ramp and $100B binding customer agreements de-risk Vera Rubin demand; AI demand structural thesis intact; catalyst is Q2 FY2027 earnings Aug 26 2026; watch NVDA relative strength on AI catalysts
Monitoring FOMC for any rate hike signals; a hike would compress tech multiples further and may warrant trimming MSFT/QQQ exposure
Iran ceasefire stability is key for SPY/broader market; re-escalation is primary geopolitical tail risk
